body:
Hey Priya, great catching up at the [Breakthrough Energy Summit](events/breakthrough-energy-summit) last week — I keep thinking about that panel on grid-scale storage, genuinely one of the better conversations I've heard all year. I wanted to follow up on what we discussed re: [Aether Grid](companies/aether-grid), because I've been doing some more digging and I'm fairly confident we came in at 11% on that seed round, not the 9% you mentioned your records showed. It was a $4.2M round and the cap table we signed reflects that, so worth reconciling before we talk about leading the Series A together. Happy to share our closing docs if that helps clear it up — no drama, these things get muddled across closings. Let me know if you have 30 minutes this week.

Amara
